name: Classic Margherita Pizza
directions: Preheat oven to 250°C (482°F) with a baking stone if available.
Roll out dough to a 12-inch circle on a floured surface.
Spread tomato sauce evenly over dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
Scatter mozzarella cheese over sauce.
Bake on the stone for 10-12 minutes until crust is crisp and cheese melts.
Finish with basil leaves, drizzle with olive oil, and season with salt and optional parmesan.
Slice and serve immediately.
image_description: A classic Neapolitan-style Margherita pizza, topped with vibrant green basil leaves, melted mozzarella cheese, and a rich red tomato sauce, presented on a rustic wooden serving board. The pizza is cut into four slices, with one slice partially pulled away, revealing a delicate, stringy mozzarella pull.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
ingredients: 1 cup heavy cream or coconut cream
directions: Marinate chicken in yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin, coriander, and a pinch of salt for at least 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat oil and sauté onion until translucent.
Add garlic and ginger; cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add marinated chicken; cook until browned on all sides.
Stir in crushed tomatoes and simmer 15 minutes.
Reduce heat and add cream; simmer 5-10 minutes until sauce thickens.
Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice or naan.
image_description: Tender chunks of charred chicken simmer in a rich, creamy tomato sauce, garnished with fresh cilantro and served in a traditional copper karahi alongside fluffy basmati rice and warm naan bread.

name: Vegetable Stir-Fry with Tofu
directions: Toss tofu with soy sauce and cornstarch.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Fry tofu until golden; remove and set aside.
Add garlic and vegetables; stir-fry 3-4 minutes until crisp-tender.
Return tofu to pan; add rice vinegar, hoisin sauce, and sesame oil.
Cook 1-2 minutes until coated; serve with steamed rice.
image_description: A vibrant vegetable stir-fry with golden-brown tofu, featuring broccoli, carrots, and snap peas in a savory brown sauce, served in a white bowl alongside a side of steamed white rice. The dish is presented with chopsticks resting beside the bowl on a neutral beige surface.

name: Greek Giouvertsa Salad with Lemon-Oregano Dressing
directions: Toss romaine, cucumber, tomatoes, onion, olives, and feta in a bowl.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper to make dressing.
Pour dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Serve immediately.
image_description: A vibrant Greek salad featuring crisp romaine lettuce, juicy tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, Kalamata olives, and crumbled feta cheese, all tossed together in a large white bowl. A small glass bowl of golden dressing and a lemon wedge sit alongside, adding a pop of color to the rustic wooden table setting.

name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
directions: Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente; reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Heat olive oil in a pan; add garlic and red pepper flakes, cook until fragrant and lightly golden.
Toss pasta with garlic oil, adding reserve water as needed.
Season, mix in parsley, and serve with parmesan.
image_description: Tender spaghetti tossed in a golden garlic and olive oil sauce, topped with grated Parmesan cheese and fresh parsley, served in a simple white bowl. Steam rises from the dish, adding to its inviting appeal.

name: Distance-Glazed Salmon with Dill
directions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Mix honey, soy sauce, mustard, and dill.
Season salmon with salt and pepper; brush with glaze.
Bake 10-12 minutes until flaky; drizzle remaining glaze over and serve.
image_description: Glazed salmon fillet, sliced into thick portions and garnished with fresh dill, sits on a wooden serving board surrounded by a rich, sticky glaze, lemon wedges, and scattered herbs. A fork rests on the salmon as a stream of glaze drips onto the board.

name: Tomato Basil Soup
directions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until translucent.
Add crushed tomatoes and broth; simmer 15 minutes.
Blend until smooth or leave chunky based on preference.
Stir in cream and basil; season to taste and serve.
image_description: Vibrant tomato basil soup is served in a light blue ceramic bowl, garnished with fresh basil leaves and herbs, and surrounded by ingredients like whole tomatoes, garlic cloves, and red chili peppers on a light gray surface. The soup is accompanied by a small bowl of cream and a jug of olive oil, highlighting its fresh and savory composition.

name: Pad Thai
ingredients: 1 tablespoon palm sugar or brown sugar
directions: Prepare noodles according to package; drain and set aside.
Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar to make sauce.
Sauté garlic in oil; add shrimp or chicken and cook through.
Push meat aside, scramble eggs in the pan, then mix with noodles.
Add sauce and bean sprouts; toss quickly.
Garnish with peanuts, lime wedges, and chili flakes if desired.
image_description: A vibrant plate of Pad Thai, loaded with succulent shrimp, scrambled eggs, and mixed vegetables, is garnished with sliced green onions and a lime wedge, surrounded by an assortment of ingredients and spices. The dish is presented on a rustic wooden table, evoking a sense of freshness and authenticity.

name: Chickpea Falafel with Tahini
ingredients: Tahini sauce: 1/4 cup tahini, lemon juice, water
directions: Pulse chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, flour, and spices until coarse.
Form into small patties or balls.
Fry in hot oil until golden and crisp.
Whisk tahini with lemon juice and water to desired consistency.
Serve falafel with tahini sauce.
image_description: Crispy golden falafel patties served on a plate with sliced red onion, lemon, and fresh parsley, surrounded by bowls of chickpeas, tahini sauce, and spices. The dish is presented in a visually appealing arrangement, with the ingredients and garnishes adding pops of color and texture.

name: Beef Tacos with Salsa Verde
directions: Cook beef with taco seasoning until browned.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet.
Fill tortillas with beef, lettuce, tomatoes, and cheese.
Top with salsa verde and sour cream if desired.
image_description: Four tacos filled with seasoned ground beef, shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, shredded cheese, guacamole, and sour cream are arranged on a blue-gray plate, surrounded by fresh ingredients and accompaniments including salsa, sour cream, and lime wedges. The vibrant colors and artful presentation evoke a festive and appetizing Mexican-inspired meal.

name: Pan-Seared Ribeye Steak
directions: Season steaks with salt and pepper.
Sear in a hot pan with butter until desired doneness (about 4-5 minutes per side for medium-rare).
Add garlic and thyme during the last minute, spooning butter over steaks.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.
image_description: Pan-seared ribeye steak, sliced and served in a cast-iron skillet with thyme sprigs and melting butter, surrounded by seasonings and ingredients on a dark surface. The steak is cooked to a medium-rare with a crispy crust and pink interior.

name: Lentil Dal with Cumin and Turmeric
directions: Rinse lentils until water runs clear.
Sauté onion and garlic in oil until soft.
Add cumin and turmeric, cook 1 minute.
Add lentils and water; simmer 20-25 minutes until soft.
Season and garnish with cilantro.
image_description: A vibrant and aromatic lentil dal garnished with fresh cilantro, thinly sliced onions, halved cherry tomatoes, and a slice of lime, served in a rustic bowl. The dish is surrounded by ingredients and spices, including turmeric powder, whole garlic cloves, and a whole onion, adding to its warm and inviting presentation.

name: Miso-Glazed Cod with Sesame Rice
ingredients: Sesame seeds and green onions for garnish
directions: Whisk miso, mirin, soy sauce, and sugar to make glaze.
Brush cod with glaze and let sit 5 minutes.
Pan-sear or bake cod until flaky.
Fluff rice with sesame oil, top with cod, sesame seeds, and green onions.
image_description: Pan-seared cod is served atop a bed of white sesame rice, garnished with toasted sesame seeds, thinly sliced green onions, and shredded ginger, all drizzled with a rich brown sauce. The dish is presented in a rustic blue ceramic bowl on a folded blue napkin, accompanied by a small bowl of additional white rice and a dish of soy sauce.

name: Caribbean Jerk Chicken
directions: Marinate chicken with jerk seasoning, lime juice, olive oil, and salt for 20 minutes.
Grill or bake until cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Rest briefly and serve with sides like rice and beans.
image_description: Caribbean Jerk Chicken drumsticks and thighs, grilled to perfection and glazed with a sticky sauce, are arranged on a wooden platter with lime wedges and fresh herbs. The dish is surrounded by small bowls of complementary ingredients, including white rice, jerk seasoning, salt, and red kidney beans.

name: Roasted Tomato and Basil Pasta
directions: Roast tomatoes and garlic with olive oil for 15-20 minutes.
Cook pasta until al dente, reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Toss pasta with roasted tomatoes, add water to loosen if needed.
Stir in torn basil and parmesan; season to taste.
image_description: Penne pasta tossed with roasted cherry tomatoes, fresh basil leaves, and shaved parmesan cheese, served on a rustic ceramic plate. The dish is surrounded by ingredients like garlic, salt, and additional cherry tomatoes on the vine, adding to its homemade appeal.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
directions: Fry paneer lightly until golden; set aside.
Sauté onion with butter, add ginger-garlic paste.
Add tomato puree and simmer 10 minutes.
Stir in cream, garam masala, and paneer; simmer 5 minutes.
Season to taste and serve with rice or naan.
image_description: Paneer butter masala in a shallow bowl, garnished with sliced onions and fresh herbs, served with naan bread and steamed basmati rice. The dish is a vibrant orange-red curry with tender paneer cubes, presented in a visually appealing composition.

name: Falooda (Dessert Drink)
ingredients: Cherries or shredded coconut for garnish
directions: In tall glasses, layer milk, rose syrup, soaked vermicelli, and sabja.
Add ice and garnish with cherries or coconut.
Serve with a spoon and straw.
image_description: Falooda dessert drink served in tall crystal glasses, layered with vermicelli noodles, red jelly, and creamy milk, topped with whipped cream, cherries, and edible flowers. Garnished with decorative spoons and surrounded by rose petals, cherries, and bowls of pink and red toppings.

name: Shakshuka
directions: Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil until soft.
Add garlic, tomatoes, paprika, and cumin; simmer 10 minutes.
Make four wells in sauce and crack in eggs.
Cover and cook until eggs set; garnish with parsley.
image_description: Vibrant Shakshuka in a cast-iron skillet, featuring eggs poached in a rich, spicy tomato sauce with sliced red and green peppers and onions, surrounded by an assortment of colorful ingredients and spices. The dish is presented in a rustic, earthy style with a variety of peppers, herbs, and spices scattered around the skillet.

name: Cuban Black Beans and Rice
ingredients: 1 cup dried black beans (or 2 cans, drained)
directions: Soak beans if using dried (overnight recommended).
Sauté onion and garlic in oil; add beans, bay leaf, cumin, and water.
Simmer until beans are tender (about 45 minutes for dried).
Serve over rice.
image_description: A hearty plate of Cuban Black Beans and Rice, featuring a mound of white rice surrounded by dark brown beans and garnished with garlic slices and green leaves, presented on a white plate with a simple yet appetizing arrangement. The dish is made with ingredients including rice, black beans, garlic, and spices, as shown in the accompanying step-by-step illustrations.

name: Beef Bulgogi
ingredients: 500g sirloin or flank steak, thinly sliced
directions: Marinate beef with soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger for 15-20 minutes.
Stir-fry in a hot pan 2-3 minutes until cooked.
Garnish with green onion and sesame seeds; serve with rice.
image_description: Tender slices of beef bulgogi, cooked to a perfect medium-rare and garnished with green onions and sesame seeds, are arranged artfully on a dark gray plate. The dish is surrounded by various accompaniments, including steamed white rice, spices, and seasonings, creating a visually appealing and appetizing presentation.

name: Spanish Paella Valenciana
directions: Brown chicken and chorizo in olive oil; set aside.
Sauté onion and pepper; add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add rice, saffron, and broth; bring to boil.
Return meat, cover, simmer until rice is cooked and liquid absorbed.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.
image_description: Saffron-infused Spanish Paella Valenciana, loaded with succulent chicken, cherry tomatoes, and aromatic rosemary, is presented in a large, shallow pan surrounded by ingredients and spices on a rustic wooden table. The dish is garnished with red chili peppers and onions, adding a pop of color and texture to the vibrant paella.

name: Tom Yum Goong
directions: Boil stock with lemongrass, lime leaves, and galangal for 10 minutes.
Add mushrooms and shrimp; cook until shrimp turn pink.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice; add chili paste if desired.
image_description: Steaming hot Tom Yum Goong soup filled with succulent shrimp, mushrooms, lemongrass, and chili peppers, garnished with fresh cilantro and a slice of lime. The vibrant orange broth is served in a white ceramic bowl with a spoon resting on the side.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
directions: Grill or pan-sear chicken; slice.
Toss lettuce with dressing and croutons.
Top with chicken slices and parmesan.
image_description: Grilled chicken breast strips top a fresh Caesar salad featuring crisp romaine lettuce, halved cherry tomatoes, and golden croutons, all tossed in a creamy dressing and garnished with shaved parmesan cheese. The dish is artfully presented in a dark bowl with a rustic, earthy tone.

name: Moussaka
ingredients: Bechamel sauce: butter, flour, milk, nutmeg
directions: Roast eggplant slices until tender.
Cook lamb with onion and garlic; add tomatoes and season.
Layer eggplant and meat mixture in dish; top with bechamel.
Bake until golden and set.
image_description: A golden-brown Moussaka casserole, layered with tender eggplant slices, rich meat sauce, and creamy bechamel, is presented in a square baking dish, surrounded by ingredients and spices. Fresh herbs garnish the dish, adding a pop of green to the warm, earthy tones of the eggplant and rich sauce.

name: Shoyu Ramen (Quick)
directions: Simmer broth with soy sauce and miso.
Cook noodles separately.
Assemble bowls with broth, noodles, meat, egg, and green onions.
image_description: A steaming bowl of Shoyu Ramen, featuring springy noodles in a rich, savory broth, topped with sliced grilled chicken, green onions, black sesame seeds, and soft-boiled egg halves. The dish is artfully arranged in a dark, speckled bowl against a sleek black background.

name: Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta
directions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Sauté garlic in olive oil; add shrimp until pink.
Toss with pasta, lemon zest/juice, and parsley.
Season and serve.
image_description: Succulent shrimp and vibrant green beans are tossed with flat noodles and slices of lemon in a savory sauce, artfully presented on a speckled ceramic plate. The dish is surrounded by an assortment of ingredients, including lemons, garlic cloves, and seasonings, adding to the warm and inviting atmosphere.

name: Ratatouille
directions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add vegetables; cook slowly with herbs until tender.
Season and serve warm or room temp.
image_description: A vibrant ratatouille dish featuring sliced eggplant, zucchini, tomatoes, and bell peppers, garnished with fresh herbs and presented in a white bowl surrounded by whole ingredients and seasonings. The colorful medley is artfully arranged on a wooden board with a fork and a spoon holding salt and red pepper flakes.

name: Crispy Skin Salmon with Dill Yogurt
directions: Season salmon; sear skin-side down in butter until crisp.
Flip and cook to desired doneness.
Mix yogurt with dill and a squeeze of lemon; serve with salmon.
image_description: Pan-seared salmon fillets with crispy skin, served with a refreshing dill yogurt sauce and lemon wedges on a rustic ceramic plate. The dish is garnished with fresh dill and seasoned with black pepper and herbs.

name: Thai Green Curry with Vegetables
ingredients: Assorted vegetables (bell peppers, zucchini, snow peas)
directions: Sauté curry paste briefly in oil.
Add coconut milk and simmer 5 minutes.
Add protein and vegetables; cook until tender.
Season with fish sauce and garnish with herbs; serve over rice.
image_description: A vibrant Thai green curry dish featuring tofu, mixed vegetables, and steamed white rice, garnished with fresh basil leaves and served in a rustic bowl. The curry is surrounded by an assortment of colorful ingredients and condiments, adding to the visual appeal of the presentation.

name: Mango Sticky Rice
directions: Cook rice in water until tender.
Warm coconut milk with sugar and salt.
Pour coconut sauce over cooked rice and let absorb.
Serve with mango slices.
image_description: A vibrant blue plate holds a bowl of creamy coconut sticky rice topped with diced mango, mango sauce, and fresh leaves, surrounded by sliced mango, a wooden spoon with salt, and small bowls of ingredients. The dish is presented with a recipe card in the background, showcasing the preparation details.

name: Herbed Quinoa Salad
ingredients: Lemon vinaigrette: lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper
directions: Cook quinoa in water until fluffy; cool.
Toss with vegetables, herbs, and vinaigrette.
Chill 10 minutes before serving if desired.
image_description: A vibrant herbed quinoa salad is presented in a shallow ceramic bowl, featuring halved cherry tomatoes and sliced cucumbers on a bed of quinoa, garnished with fresh parsley and accompanied by lemon wedges and a small bowl of olive oil on a dark gray surface. The dish is artfully arranged and surrounded by scattered ingredients and a fork, suggesting a fresh and healthy meal.

name: Beef Shawarma Wrap
directions: Marinate beef with shawarma spices.
Cook beef in a hot pan until done.
Fill pitas with beef and vegetables; drizzle with sauce.
image_description: Tenderly sliced beef, crisp lettuce, juicy tomatoes, and refreshing cucumber are wrapped in a warm pita bread, surrounded by an assortment of complementary dips and garnishes. The vibrant ingredients and rustic presentation evoke a fresh and appetizing Middle Eastern-inspired meal.

name: Pesto Chicken Bake
directions: Season chicken and place in baking dish.
Top each with pesto, mozzarella, and tomatoes.
Bake at 200°C (400°F) for 22-25 minutes until chicken is cooked.
image_description: Pesto Chicken Bake features seared chicken breasts on a bed of pasta smothered in melted mozzarella, vibrant pesto sauce, and roasted cherry tomatoes, all perfectly baked in a ceramic dish. A side of fresh pesto in a wooden spoon and utensils on a napkin complete the inviting presentation.

name: Baked Eggplant Parmesan
directions: Dip eggplant slices in egg then breadcrumbs; bake until tender.
Layer with marinara and cheese; bake until golden.
image_description: Baked Eggplant Parmesan in a rectangular baking dish, layered with breaded eggplant slices, marinara sauce, and melted cheese, surrounded by ingredients and condiments on a rustic wooden table. The dish is golden brown and bubbly, topped with a generous sprinkling of grated Parmesan cheese.

name: Moroccan Chickpea Stew
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add spices.
Add chickpeas and tomatoes; simmer 15-20 minutes.
Garnish with cilantro and serve.
image_description: A hearty Moroccan Chickpea Stew served in a decorative brown ceramic bowl, garnished with fresh cilantro and diced tomatoes, surrounded by ingredients and spices on a rustic wooden table. The stew's rich reddish-brown broth is filled with chickpeas and topped with a vibrant mixture of tomatoes and herbs.

name: Crunchy Cabbage Slaw
directions: Mix dressing ingredients.
Toss with shredded cabbage and carrot.
Chill slightly before serving.
image_description: Crunchy Cabbage Slaw is a vibrant mix of shredded green cabbage and carrots, presented in a blue ceramic bowl. The dish is surrounded by its individual ingredients and preparation elements, showcasing the recipe's components in small bowls and utensils on a wooden table.

name: Ceviche de Pescado
directions: Cure fish in lime juice for about 10-15 minutes until opaque.
Mix with onion, chili, and cilantro; season and serve.
image_description: Fresh fish ceviche marinated in citrus juices, garnished with sliced red chili peppers, red onion, and cilantro, served in a rustic ceramic bowl. The dish is surrounded by whole and sliced chili peppers, limes, and red onion on a wooden cutting board.

name: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Krapow Gai)
directions: Sauté garlic and chili in oil until fragrant.
Add chicken and cook through.
Stir in soy and fish sauces; toss with basil until wilted.
Serve over steamed rice.
image_description: Savor the vibrant Thai Basil Chicken, a harmonious blend of tender chicken, fragrant basil, and spicy chilies, served atop a bed of fluffy white rice on a decorative plate. The dish is garnished with fresh basil leaves and surrounded by an assortment of aromatic ingredients, including garlic cloves, peppercorns, and chili peppers.

name: Caprese Salad
directions: Alternate tomato and mozzarella slices on a plate.
Top with basil; drizzle olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Season with salt and pepper.
image_description: Fresh Caprese salad featuring alternating slices of ripe red tomatoes and creamy white mozzarella cheese, garnished with fragrant green basil leaves and drizzled with a rich balsamic glaze. The salad is artfully arranged on a white plate, set against a rustic wooden board and surrounded by a scattering of fresh basil and a small bowl of balsamic glaze.

name: Pumpkin Risotto
directions: Sauté onion in olive oil until translucent.
Add rice and toast 1-2 minutes.
Add warm broth gradually, stirring until absorbed.
Stir in pumpkin puree, butter, and parmesan; season to taste.
image_description: Pumpkin risotto in a large pan, divided into stages of preparation, with cooked rice, roasted pumpkin puree, diced pumpkin, shallots, and melting butter. The dish is surrounded by ingredients including shallots, garlic, salt, butter, and pumpkin.

name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
directions: Melt butter; add garlic and cook 1 minute.
Add shrimp; cook until pink.
Squeeze lemon juice; garnish with parsley and serve.
image_description: Succulent shrimp are sautéed in a rich garlic butter sauce, garnished with fresh parsley and served sizzling in a black skillet surrounded by lemon wedges and garlic cloves on a wooden serving board. The dish is presented with a rustic, homemade charm, accompanied by utensils and condiments.

name: Roasted Red Pepper Hummus
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve with pita or veggies.
image_description: Creamy roasted red pepper hummus garnished with chickpeas, red chili peppers, and a drizzle of olive oil, served in a rustic bowl and surrounded by fresh peppers, pita bread, and spices. The dish is artfully presented on a dark wooden table with various accompaniments and seasonings.

name: Garlic Naan
directions: Mix ingredients to form dough; knead until smooth.
Let rise 1 hour; divide and roll into rounds.
Cook on hot skillet 2-3 minutes per side.
Brush with garlic butter and serve.
image_description: Garlic naan breads, lightly charred and topped with garlic cloves and herbs, are arranged on a plate around a small bowl of garlic cloves. The naan is served on a gray plate with a fork and knife on either side.

name: Butter Chicken
directions: Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add chicken and cook until sealed.
Stir in tomato sauce and garam masala; simmer 15 minutes.
Stir in cream; season and serve with rice or naan.
image_description: Tender cubes of paneer are simmered in a rich, vibrant red sauce, garnished with fresh green leaves, onions, and spices, and served in a blue bowl against a dark background. The dish is generously seasoned with a variety of spices and herbs, adding depth and complexity to its appearance.

name: Coconut Curry Lentil Soup
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add curry powder.
Add lentils, coconut milk, and broth; simmer 25 minutes.
Season and serve hot.
image_description: Steaming hot coconut curry lentil soup served in a rustic brown bowl, garnished with a swirl of cream, dried red chilies, and fresh herbs, surrounded by ingredients like turmeric, lentils, and lemons. The vibrant orange-yellow soup is rich and creamy, with visible lentils and a sprinkle of spices.

name: Gyro Wrap
ingredients: Gyro meat (lamb or chicken) or substitute with sliced chicken
directions: Cook gyro meat until browned.
Warm pita; fill with meat and vegetables.
Top with tzatziki.
image_description: A juicy gyro wrap filled with tender lamb, crisp cucumber, ripe tomato, and thinly sliced red onion, all wrapped in a warm pita bread and served with a side of creamy tzatziki sauce. The vibrant ingredients are artfully arranged on a rustic wooden board, surrounded by fresh tomatoes and a sprinkle of herbs.

name: Pollo a la Brasa (Peruvian Roast Chicken)
directions: Marinate chicken with garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Roast at 200°C (400°F) for 40-45 minutes until cooked.
Serve with lime wedges.
image_description: A succulent Peruvian-style roast chicken, broken into quarters and arranged on a rustic clay platter, is garnished with fresh lime wedges and spices, showcasing its golden-brown, crispy skin. The dish is presented on a warm, earthy-toned surface, surrounded by additional limes, garlic cloves, and spices, evoking a cozy and inviting atmosphere.

name: Mango Salsa Chicken
directions: Season chicken and sear in a pan.
Top with mango salsa (mango, onion, cilantro, lime juice).
Bake 10 minutes to finish cooking.
image_description: Grilled chicken breasts smothered in a vibrant mango salsa made with diced mango, red onion, and cilantro, served on a white plate with lime wedges. The dish is garnished with fresh cilantro leaves and presented on a dark background.

name: Rice Paper Rolls with Peanut Dip
directions: Soak rice papers; fill with noodles, greens, and protein.
Roll tightly; serve with peanut dip.
image_description: Fresh spring rolls filled with shrimp, carrots, and vegetables are arranged on a round platter around a bowl of creamy peanut sauce garnished with sesame seeds and mint, surrounded by fresh herbs, rice noodles, and additional ingredients. The dish is presented in a visually appealing composition with scattered peanuts and basil leaves on a muted green background.

name: Beef Nachos
directions: Cook beef with seasoning.
Layer chips, beef, and cheese; bake until cheese melts.
Top with beans, salsa, sour cream, and jalapenos.
image_description: A vibrant platter of beef nachos, topped with seasoned ground beef, refried beans, melted cheese, sour cream, sliced jalapeños, and cherry tomatoes, surrounded by bowls of complementary toppings and ingredients. The dish is presented on a rustic wooden table with a recipe card and various condiments.

name: Herbed Chicken Skewers
directions: Thread chicken onto skewers after marinating briefly.
Grill until cooked through, basting with oil and herbs.
Serve with lemon wedges.
image_description: Herbed chicken skewers, grilled to perfection and seasoned with rosemary and black pepper, are arranged on a plate with lemon wedges and drizzled with a savory oil. The dish is presented on a rustic gray plate, surrounded by scattered rosemary sprigs and coarse salt.

name: Coconut Shrimp Curry
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add curry powder.
Add coconut milk and vegetables; simmer 10 minutes.
Add shrimp; cook until pink and serve.
image_description: Succulent shrimp, sliced onions, red bell peppers, and green chilies are artfully arranged in a vibrant yellow coconut curry sauce within a black skillet, surrounded by an assortment of ingredients and spices. The dish is presented in a stylized illustration, showcasing the key components of the Coconut Shrimp Curry recipe.

name: Herbed Mushroom Risotto
directions: Sauté onion and mushrooms; add rice and toast.
Deglaze with wine; add broth gradually until creamy.
image_description: Creamy risotto topped with sautéed mushrooms, fresh herbs, and shaved parmesan cheese is presented in a rustic brown bowl, surrounded by ingredients and condiments. The dish is garnished with a sprig of rosemary and features a rich, earthy color palette.

name: Lemon Ricotta Pancakes
directions: Mix all ingredients into a smooth batter.
Cook on a hot skillet until bubbles form; flip and cook through.
image_description: Golden brown lemon ricotta pancakes dusted with powdered sugar and topped with a pat of butter, served on a metal platter surrounded by various ingredients and toppings. The dish is accompanied by small bowls of butter, syrup, and lemon zest, as well as a halved lemon and piles of powdered sugar.

name: Egg Fried Rice
directions: Scramble eggs in a wok; set aside.
Stir-fry vegetables, add rice, then eggs.
Season with soy sauce and scallions.
image_description: Egg fried rice is presented in a rustic cast-iron skillet, topped with four sunny-side-up eggs and garnished with green onions and black sesame seeds. The dish is surrounded by additional green onions and dipping sauces, adding to its savory appeal.

name: Okonomiyaki (Japanese Pancake)
directions: Mix batter with cabbage.
Cook on a griddle; top with meat and flip.
Brush with sauce and drizzle with mayo.
image_description: Savory okonomiyaki pancake topped with succulent shrimp, shredded cabbage, and drizzled with mayonnaise and sauce, served on a rustic wooden table with complementary condiments. The dish is presented on a round, off-white plate with a delicate sprinkle of seasoning around the base.

name: Herb-Ceta Pasta with Lemon
directions: Cook pasta; reserve some pasta water.
Toss with lemon zest, juice, herbs, and olive oil.
Add a splash of pasta water; finish with parmesan.
image_description: Penne pasta tossed in a vibrant green herb sauce, topped with shaved parmesan cheese, fresh basil leaves, and lemon wedges, served in a rustic ceramic bowl. The dish is surrounded by ingredients and seasonings, including lemons, olive oil, and a pepper grinder, on a weathered gray surface.

name: Coconut Rice with Beans
directions: Simmer coconut milk with garlic powder; stir in beans and cilantro.
Serve over rice.
image_description: A large silver pot contains a creamy coconut rice and bean dish, surrounded by various ingredients and spices, including bowls of white rice, dried beans, curry powder, and seasonings, arranged on a light gray surface. The dish is partially cooked, with raw black beans visible on one side and a mixture of rice, beans, and vegetables on the other.

name: Baked Cod with Tomato and Olive
directions: Place cod in baking dish; top with tomatoes, olives, and garlic.
Drizzle with olive oil; bake at 200°C (400°F) for 12-15 minutes.
Garnish with parsley.
image_description: Baked cod fillet seasoned with herbs and topped with a mixture of diced tomatoes and olives, surrounded by halved cherry tomatoes, green and black olives, and roasted garlic cloves in a savory olive oil sauce, garnished with fresh parsley. The dish is presented on a rustic ceramic plate with a knife and fork on the side, set against a warm, earthy-toned background.

name: Seared Tuna Niçoise
directions: Sear tuna to desired doneness.
Boil beans and potatoes; assemble with eggs and olives.
Dress with lemon vinaigrette.
image_description: Seared tuna steaks served on a bed of green beans, surrounded by boiled potatoes, halved hard-boiled eggs, and garnished with green olives, lemon wedges, and fresh herbs, presented on a round plate with a simple yet elegant arrangement. The dish is accompanied by two small bowls of additional olives and capers on the side.

name: Harissa Chickpea Bowl
directions: Roast chickpeas with harissa 15-20 minutes.
Serve over quinoa with fresh vegetables and lemon yogurt sauce.
image_description: A vibrant Harissa Chickpea Bowl featuring couscous topped with spiced chickpeas, sliced cucumbers, juicy tomatoes, and a dollop of creamy white sauce, finished with a sprinkle of red spice and fresh herbs. The dish is artfully presented in a decorative bowl with an intricate pattern, surrounded by complementary condiments and spices.

name: Salmon with Dill and Mustard Glaze
directions: Mix glaze with mustard, dill, and honey.
Brush on salmon; bake or pan-sear until flaky.
image_description: Grilled salmon fillets topped with a golden mustard glaze, fresh dill, and coarse salt, served on a dark baking sheet surrounded by scattered herbs and glaze residue. The dish is accompanied by bowls of oil, salt, and herbs in the background, adding to the rustic presentation.

name: Butter Lettuce Salad with Avocado
directions: Toss greens with avocado and tomatoes.
Drizzle with vinaigrette and serve.
image_description: Fresh butter lettuce leaves are mixed with halved cherry tomatoes and diced avocado, topped with a light seasoning and served in a white bowl with a fork, ready to be dressed with a vibrant yellow vinaigrette being poured from a small pitcher. The salad is surrounded by additional ingredients and a light green napkin on a brown surface.

name: Eggplant Caponata
directions: Sauté eggplant until soft.
Add vegetables and simmer with vinegar and sugar until thick.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
image_description: A vibrant eggplant caponata dish is presented in a rustic ceramic bowl, featuring a colorful medley of sautéed eggplant, celery, tomatoes, green olives, and capers in a rich sauce. The dish is garnished with a few loose ingredients and fresh parsley on the side, accompanied by a wooden spoon.

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
directions: Toast bread; mash avocado with lemon, salt, and pepper.
Poach eggs; place on toast and serve.
image_description: Toasted bread topped with mashed avocado, sliced avocado, and two poached eggs, garnished with herbs and spices, and served with lemon wedges on a light blue plate. The dish is surrounded by additional ingredients, including olive oil, salt, and halved avocados, on a blue-gray surface.

name: Herbed Tomato Soup
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add tomatoes and broth.
Simmer 20 minutes; blend until smooth.
Stir in cream and herbs; season and serve.
image_description: A vibrant red herbed tomato soup is served in a black bowl, garnished with sliced tomatoes, fresh basil, thyme, and a swirl of cream, surrounded by ingredients and cooking elements on a dark gray surface. The soup is the centerpiece of a visually appealing composition that includes a recipe title and instructions.

name: Pesto Gnocchi with Cherry Tomatoes
directions: Boil gnocchi until floating; drain.
Toss with pesto and halved tomatoes; top with parmesan.
image_description: Tender gnocchi smothered in a vibrant green pesto sauce, topped with halved cherry tomatoes and sprinkled with grated Parmesan cheese, all presented on a rustic white plate with a brown rim. Fresh basil leaves add a pop of color around the dish.

name: Paneer Butter Fry
directions: Sauté onion in butter; add paneer and brown.
Add tomato paste and spices; simmer with a splash of cream.
image_description: Paneer butter masala in a dark brown bowl, featuring golden-brown paneer cubes, sautéed onions, and tomatoes in a rich red sauce, topped with a dollop of creamy white butter. The dish is garnished with green herbs and spices, adding a pop of color and freshness to the vibrant, saucy curry.

name: Lemon Garlic Roasted Brussels Sprouts
directions: Toss sprouts with oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Roast at 200°C (400°F) for 20-25 minutes; finish with lemon zest.
image_description: Roasted Brussels sprouts are presented in a rustic brown bowl, tossed with roasted garlic cloves, lemon slices, and a blend of spices, showcasing a mix of vibrant green and golden-brown hues. The dish is garnished with scattered garlic cloves and seasonings around the bowl, adding to its earthy appeal.

name: Paneer Tarsi with Spinach
directions: Sauté onion and tomato; add spices.
Stir in spinach until wilted; add paneer and simmer briefly.
image_description: A vibrant and colorful dish of paneer tarsi with spinach is presented in a large pan, featuring tender paneer cubes, fresh spinach leaves, halved cherry tomatoes, and onion rings. The dish is surrounded by an assortment of ingredients, including whole spices, spice powders, fresh herbs, and other key components.

name: Rendang Beef
directions: Simmer beef with coconut milk and rendang paste with aromatics until tender and thickened.
image_description: Tender chunks of beef in a rich, dark orange rendang curry sauce, garnished with fresh green leaves and served in a rustic clay pot, surrounded by an assortment of whole spices and ingredients. The dish is presented on a warm, earthy-toned wooden table, evoking a sense of traditional Malaysian cuisine.

name: Chili Con Carne
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add beef and brown.
Add spices, tomato sauce, and beans; simmer 25-30 minutes.
image_description: A hearty bowl of chili con carne garnished with fresh basil and scallions, surrounded by an assortment of colorful ingredients and spices. The dish is presented in a rustic, cast-iron pot, evoking a warm and inviting atmosphere.

name: Persian Jeweled Rice
directions: Cook rice; mix with saffron and jeweled mix of nuts and dried fruits.
Fluff and serve.
image_description: Persian Jeweled Rice is presented in an ornate gold-rimmed dish, topped with a colorful medley of dried fruits and nuts, including almonds, raisins, and candied orange peel, on a bed of saffron-infused white rice. The dish is surrounded by scattered ingredients and complementary bowls on a rustic wooden table.

name: Moroccan Lentil Soup (Harira)
directions: Sauté onions, garlic; add tomato paste and spices.
Add lentils and chickpeas with water; simmer until tender.
Finish with lemon juice and herbs.
image_description: A vibrant Moroccan Lentil Soup (Harira) is presented in a large black pot, garnished with fresh parsley and featuring a rich, reddish-brown broth filled with chickpeas, sliced tomatoes, and onions. The soup is surrounded by various ingredients and spices, including chickpeas, tomatoes, onions, and an assortment of spices and seasonings.

name: Thai Red Curry with Chicken
directions: Sauté curry paste in oil; add chicken to sear.
Pour in coconut milk; add vegetables and simmer until cooked.
Finish with basil and fish sauce.
image_description: Vibrant Thai red curry with grilled chicken, bell peppers, and Thai basil, served in a rustic ceramic bowl and garnished with fresh herbs. The dish is richly colored with a deep red curry sauce, mixed vegetables, and tender chunks of chicken.

name: Pasta Arrabbiata
directions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Sauté garlic and chili in olive oil; add tomato sauce.
Toss with pasta and garnish with parsley.
image_description: Penne pasta tossed in a spicy arrabbiata sauce with cherry tomatoes, chili peppers, and parsley, served in a rustic brown bowl on a wooden table. The dish is garnished with fresh parsley and surrounded by ingredients like garlic, red chili peppers, and a bowl of red pepper flakes.

name: Cranberry Walnut Salad
directions: Toss greens with cranberries, walnuts, and cheese.
Drizzle with vinaigrette.
image_description: Mixed greens salad tossed with crumbled feta cheese, sliced cucumber, toasted walnuts, and fresh cranberries, finished with a drizzle of dark glaze and crumbled white cheese. The dish is presented in a rustic bowl surrounded by scattered ingredients and condiments.

name: Corn Chowder
directions: Sauté onion in butter; add potatoes and corn.
Add milk and simmer until thickened; season.
image_description: A steaming bowl of corn chowder, garnished with chopped scallions, is surrounded by key ingredients including corn on the cob, potatoes, onion, salt, and a wooden spoon. The dish is presented in a rustic, hand-drawn style, highlighting the creamy texture and vibrant yellow color of the chowder.

name: Eggplant Yakitori Skewers
ingredients: Soy glaze: soy sauce, sugar, mirin
directions: Skewer eggplant chunks; brush with glaze.
Grill until tender; garnish with sesame seeds.
image_description: Grilled eggplant skewers glazed with a rich brown sauce and sprinkled with sesame seeds, served on a rustic plate with scattered sesame seeds and a side of dipping sauce. The dish is arranged artfully, showcasing the tender eggplant and glossy sauce.

name: Chana Masala
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add spices.
Add tomatoes and chickpeas; simmer 15-20 minutes.
image_description: Chana Masala, a vibrant and aromatic Indian dish, is presented in a large bowl surrounded by its key ingredients, including chickpeas, tomatoes, onions, and various spices. The dish is garnished with fresh cilantro and topped with sliced tomatoes and onions, showcasing its rich colors and textures.

name: Buttermilk Pancakes
directions: Mix dry ingredients; whisk in wet ingredients until smooth.
Cook on a hot skillet until bubbles form; flip and cook through.
image_description: Golden brown buttermilk pancakes, freshly cooked in a skillet and topped with poached eggs, are surrounded by bowls of eggs and condiments, and pitchers of syrup on a rustic wooden table. The warm, inviting scene is bathed in soft, natural light streaming through a nearby window.

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Chill and serve.
image_description: A glass of creamy mango lassi is garnished with ground spices and a drizzle of mango puree, surrounded by fresh mango, cardamom pods, and various sweeteners on a rustic wooden table. The beverage is presented in a clear glass, showcasing its layered texture and inviting appearance.

name: Pesto Pasta with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
directions: Cook pasta; drain.
Toss with pesto and sun-dried tomatoes; top with parmesan.
image_description: Pesto pasta with sun-dried tomatoes, featuring a generous serving of mixed pasta tossed in vibrant green pesto sauce, topped with sun-dried tomatoes and grated Parmesan cheese. The dish is presented on a large white plate, surrounded by an assortment of ingredients including cherry tomatoes, cheese wedges, and bowls of pesto and Parmesan.

name: Salisbury Steak with Mushroom Gravy
directions: Form patties and brown in a pan; set aside.
Make gravy with mushrooms, onion, flour, and broth; return patties to pan and simmer.
image_description: A savory Salisbury steak patty smothered in a rich brown mushroom gravy and topped with sautéed mushrooms, served with a side of creamy mashed potatoes and onions. The dish is garnished with fresh herbs and presented in a rustic brown bowl.

name: Simple Garlic Herb Salmon
directions: Season salmon; sear in a pan with garlic and herbs.
Finish with lemon juice and serve.
image_description: Pan-seared salmon fillets topped with garlic, fresh dill, and peppercorns, served in a rustic skillet with a slice of lemon and surrounded by additional herbs and seasonings. The dish is presented on a wooden table with various condiments and ingredients arranged around the skillet.

name: Gnocchi with Sage Butter
directions: Cook gnocchi until floating.
Brown butter with sage; toss with gnocchi and parmesan.
image_description: Pan-seared gnocchi tossed with crispy sage leaves and grated Parmesan cheese, served in a rustic ceramic bowl. The dish is surrounded by ingredients and condiments, including olive oil, additional Parmesan, and fresh sage.

name: Shredded Beef Tostadas
directions: Slow-cook beef with spices until tender; shred.
Top tostadas with beef and toppings.
image_description: Three crispy corn tortillas topped with shredded beef, fresh salsa, and sour cream are arranged on a dark plate, surrounded by lime wedges and accompanied by bowls of salsa, sour cream, and shredded cheese on a rustic wooden table. The dish is garnished with cilantro and presented in a vibrant and appetizing display.

name: Chili Lime Grilled Corn
directions: Grill corn until charred; brush with butter.
Sprinkle chili powder and drizzle lime juice; season.
image_description: Grilled corn on the cob smothered in chili powder, minced garlic, and sliced chili peppers, finished with a squeeze of fresh lime juice and arranged on a slate platter. The vibrant yellow corn is charred to perfection, surrounded by bowls of chili powder and corn kernels, with lime wedges and chili peppers scattered throughout.

name: Herbed Rice with Peas
directions: Cook rice with peas; stir in greens and butter.
image_description: Herbed rice with green peas is presented in a shallow bowl, garnished with fresh herbs and surrounded by ingredients including raw rice, peas, onions, and spices. The dish is artfully arranged on a light-colored surface, showcasing its vibrant colors and textures.

name: Gulai Ayam (Indonesian Curry Chicken)
directions: Sauté curry paste; add chicken and coconut milk.
Simmer with vegetables until cooked.
image_description: Tender chunks of chicken and an assortment of vegetables including carrots, potatoes, green beans, and peas are simmered in a rich and creamy yellow curry sauce, served in a rustic pan. The vibrant colors and hearty ingredients create a warm and inviting dish.

name: Spicy Peanut Noodles
directions: Cook noodles; whisk sauce with peanut butter.
Toss noodles with sauce and sesame seeds.
image_description: A vibrant bowl of Spicy Peanut Noodles, topped with peanuts, sesame seeds, sliced chilies, green onions, and seaweed, served in a blue-rimmed ceramic bowl and surrounded by an assortment of ingredients and condiments. The dish is artfully presented on a light gray surface, showcasing its rich colors and textures.

name: Herbed Quiche
directions: Whisk eggs with cream and herbs.
Fill crust with cheese and vegetables; pour mixture and bake until set.
image_description: Herbed quiche with a golden-brown crust, sliced into eight portions, surrounded by fresh herbs and ingredients including eggs, cheese, and spices. The quiche filling is visible, featuring runny egg yolks, spinach, and other vegetables.

name: Baked Ziti
directions: Cook pasta; mix with sauce and meat.
Top with cheese and bake until bubbly.
image_description: A baked pasta dish featuring rigatoni, meat sauce, and melted white cheese is presented in a white, ribbed ceramic baking dish, accompanied by fresh tomatoes and a side of marinara sauce. The dish is arranged on a wooden platter, creating a warm and inviting presentation.

name: Herbed Shrimp and Grits
directions: Prepare grits as per package instructions with butter.
Sauté shrimp with garlic; stir in lemon and parsley.
Serve shrimp over grits.
image_description: Succulent shrimp in a rich garlic butter sauce atop creamy grits, garnished with fresh parsley and black pepper, in a shallow white bowl. The dish is elegantly presented on a light-colored surface with a spoon and accompaniments.

name: Duck Confit (Simple Version)
ingredients: Duck legs confit (or duck legs and fat)
directions: Crisp duck skin in a hot skillet; finish in oven until skin is golden and meat is tender.
image_description: Two golden-brown duck legs are slow-cooked in a rich, savory fat with garlic cloves and fresh herbs in a rustic cast-iron pan, presented on a wooden board with accompaniments of peppercorns, salt, and rendered fat. The dish is garnished with sprigs of thyme and surrounded by the aromatic ingredients that flavored the confit.

name: Lemon Olive Oil Cake
directions: Mix ingredients; bake in loaf pan until a toothpick comes out clean.
image_description: Moist lemon olive oil cake, sliced and presented with fresh lemons and ingredients, showcases a vibrant yellow crumb and golden-brown crust. The cake is surrounded by key ingredients including lemons, olive oil, and eggs, highlighting its fresh and citrusy flavors.

name: Salsa Verde Chicken Tajine
directions: Combine ingredients in a tajine or pot; simmer until chicken is cooked and flavors meld.
image_description: Tender chicken pieces are slow-cooked in a rich, green salsa verde sauce with chickpeas, potatoes, carrots, onions, and a mix of green and black olives, all presented in a traditional clay tajine pot. The dish is garnished with fresh herbs, adding a pop of color and freshness to the hearty stew.

name: Coconut Lime Chicken
directions: Sauté garlic and curry paste; add chicken and coconut milk.
Simmer until chicken is cooked; finish with lime juice.
image_description: Coconut lime chicken curry served in a shallow gray bowl, garnished with sliced limes, red chilies, shallots, garlic, and cilantro, surrounded by ingredients and spices on a dark blue-gray surface. The dish is presented with a rustic, earthy aesthetic and a pop of vibrant colors.

name: Spinach and Feta Stuffed Peppers
directions: Cook filling with spinach and feta; stuff peppers.
Bake in sauce until peppers tender.
image_description: Six baked bell peppers, three green and three yellow, are arranged in a cast-iron skillet on a bed of marinara sauce, filled with a mixture of rice, spinach, and topped with a golden-brown block of feta cheese, garnished with fresh basil leaves. The peppers are presented in a rustic, dark-toned setting with scattered sesame seeds and basil leaves.

name: Gado-Gado (Indonesian Peanut Salad)
ingredients: Peanut sauce: peanuts, palm sugar, tamarind, lime
directions: Arrange vegetables, eggs, and tofu on a plate.
Drizzle with warm peanut sauce and serve.
image_description: A vibrant Gado-Gado salad is artfully arranged on a blue ceramic plate, featuring a colorful medley of steamed vegetables, tofu, chickpeas, and boiled egg, all topped with a rich peanut sauce and garnished with nuts. The dish is presented on a rustic cloth napkin, surrounded by scattered peanuts and fresh mint leaves.

name: Kung Pao Chicken
ingredients: 1 tablespoon cornstarch mixed with 1 tablespoon water
directions: In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar to make the sauce.
Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the chicken until cooked through; remove and set aside.
In the same wok, sauté garlic, ginger, and dried chilies until fragrant.
Return chicken to the wok, add the peanuts and the sauce mixture.
Stir in the cornstarch slurry and cook until the sauce thickens and coats the chicken.
Serve hot with steamed rice.
image_description: Sizzling Kung Pao chicken is presented in a wok, surrounded by an assortment of ingredients including peanuts, chilies, garlic, and various seasonings, creating a vibrant and appetizing display. The dish features tender chicken, crisp peanuts, and sliced chilies in a savory sauce, garnished with scallions.

name: Mapo Tofu
directions: Brown the ground meat in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the spicy bean paste and peppercorns, stirring until fragrant and the oil turns red.
Pour in the chicken broth and soy sauce; bring to a simmer.
Gently add the tofu cubes and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the cornstarch slurry to thicken the sauce.
Garnish with green onions and serve.
image_description: Mapo tofu, a spicy Sichuan dish, is presented in a large skillet with tender tofu cubes and ground meat in a rich, reddish-brown sauce, garnished with sliced green onions. The skillet is surrounded by various ingredients and cooking utensils, adding to the authentic and appetizing presentation.

name: Beef and Broccoli
ingredients: 300g flank steak, thinly sliced against the grain
directions: Toss beef slices with cornstarch and a splash of soy sauce; let sit for 10 minutes.
Blanch broccoli in boiling water for 2 minutes, then drain.
Heat oil in a wok and sear beef at high heat until browned; remove.
Stir-fry ginger for 30 seconds, then add broccoli, oyster sauce, and soy sauce.
Return beef to the wok and toss everything together for 1 minute.
Serve immediately.
image_description: Sliced beef and broccoli florets are stir-fried with mushrooms and cashews, served in a wok with a savory sauce. The dish is presented on a wooden platter, surrounded by various ingredients and seasonings.

name: General Tso's Chicken
ingredients: 500g chicken thighs, cut into bite-sized pieces
directions: Coat chicken pieces thoroughly in cornstarch.
Deep fry chicken in hot oil until crispy and golden; drain on paper towels.
In a separate pan, sauté ginger, garlic, and chilies.
Add soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar; simmer until the sugar dissolves.
Toss the crispy chicken into the sauce until fully coated.
Serve over white rice.
image_description: General Tso's Chicken served with steamed white rice, garnished with sliced red chili peppers and chunks of ginger, and topped with sesame seeds. The dish is presented in a brown ceramic bowl with chopsticks placed beside it.

name: Pork Potstickers (Dumplings)
directions: Mix pork, cabbage, soy sauce, sesame oil, and ginger in a bowl.
Place a teaspoon of filling in the center of a wrapper, moisten edges, and fold/pleat to seal.
Heat oil in a flat skillet and arrange dumplings in a single layer.
Fry for 2 minutes until bottoms are golden.
Pour in water and immediately cover with a lid to steam for 5-7 minutes.
Remove lid and cook until water evaporates and bottoms are crispy again.
image_description: Pan-seared pork potstickers served in a rustic cast-iron skillet with a small bowl of soy sauce and sesame seeds on the side, garnished with green onions and sesame seeds sprinkled over the dumplings. The dish is presented on a wooden trivet, adding a touch of warmth to the overall presentation.

name: Hot and Sour Soup
directions: Bring broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add tofu, bamboo shoots, soy sauce, and white pepper.
Stir in the cornstarch slurry and simmer until thickened.
Slowly drizzle in the beaten egg while stirring gently to create ribbons.
Stir in the rice vinegar at the very end to preserve the 'sour' punch.
Garnish with green onions.
image_description: A steaming pot of hot and sour soup filled with tofu, bamboo shoots, and noodles, garnished with green onions and a raw egg yolk. The soup is presented in a large black pot surrounded by various ingredients and seasonings.

name: Chow Mein
directions: Boil noodles according to package instructions, drain, and set aside.
Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry cabbage and carrots for 3 minutes.
Add the noodles to the wok.
Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sugar, then pour over the noodles.
Toss at high heat for 2-3 minutes until noodles are slightly charred and well coated.
Serve hot.
image_description: A vibrant and savory chow mein dish featuring stir-fried noodles, broccoli, carrots, cabbage, and bell peppers, served on a rustic ceramic plate with chopsticks and accompanied by soy sauce and sesame seeds. The colorful medley of vegetables and noodles is artfully arranged, creating a visually appealing and appetizing presentation.

name: Wonton Soup
directions: Bring chicken broth and soy sauce to a boil in a pot.
Add the wontons and simmer for 5 minutes (or until they float).
Add bok choy and cook for 1 minute until wilted.
Turn off heat and stir in sesame oil.
Ladle into bowls and garnish with green onions.
image_description: Three bowls of wonton soup filled with delicate dumplings, sliced green onions, and bok choy, are arranged on a wooden tray surrounded by various seasonings and condiments. The dish is presented in a rustic, homespun style with an assortment of accompaniments.

name: Honey Walnut Shrimp
directions: Dip shrimp in egg, then coat with cornstarch.
Fry shrimp in hot oil until golden and crispy; drain.
In a large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, honey, and condensed milk.
Toss the warm shrimp and candied walnuts into the sauce until evenly coated.
Serve immediately, usually garnished with steamed broccoli.
image_description: Succulent shrimp, steamed broccoli florets, and walnuts are artfully arranged in a blue ceramic bowl, topped with a rich, creamy sauce and a drizzle of honey. The vibrant colors and textures create a visually appealing dish that showcases the harmony of flavors and ingredients.
